privileged_info_summary: This is a LibreCAD CAD drawing task with synthetic user-created content (not from external dataset). The output file is saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/cam_profile.dxf. The drawing contains two layers: PROFILE (outer pear-shaped cam outline) and BORE (central shaft hole with keyway). PROFILE layer consists of a base circle with radius 30mm centered at origin and a nose circle with radius 10mm centered at (0,50), connected with tangent lines. BORE layer contains a 10mm radius shaft hole centered at origin with a 5mm wide keyway notch whose top edge is at Y=13mm. All geometric specifications have been verified against task description and verifier logic.
